hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/AGENTS.md"; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; d=$(grep -m1 "Last system review:" "$f" | grep -oE "[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}"); [ -z "$d" ] && exit 0; re=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "$d" "+%s" 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$re" ] && exit 0; now=$(date "+%s"); days=$(( (now - re) / 86400 )); [ "$days" -ge 28 ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"System review last run %s (%d days ago, threshold 28 days). Per AGENTS.md, suggest a system review before the next task. User decides — do not auto-run."}}' "$d" "$days"; exit 0
